title: Arrival in Kabul
description: Fly into Kabul International Airport and transfer to your guesthouse. Evening welcome dinner with your guide.

title: Kabul to Bamiyan
description: Early departure for the 4-hour drive through the Hindu Kush to Bamiyan valley. Visit Shahr-e Gholghola ruins. Check into guesthouse.
activities: Drive through Hindu Kush;Shahr-e Gholghola;Bamiyan valley orientation

title: Bamiyan Buddha Niches
description: Full day exploring the UNESCO-listed Bamiyan valley. Climb into the Buddha niches. Visit the local museum.

title: Band-e Amir National Park
description: Drive to Band-e Amir for a full day at Afghanistan's first national park. Swim or kayak in the lakes. Sunset over the plateau.

title: Return to Kabul
description: Morning drive back to Kabul. Afternoon free for shopping at Chicken Street. Evening transfer to airport.

title: Kabul Old City
description: Explore the old city – Murad Khane quarter, Shah-do Shamshira mosque, and Kabul bazaar. Overnight at boutique hotel.

title: Gardens & Museums
description: Babur's Garden in the morning, followed by the National Museum in the afternoon. Sunset from TV Hill.

title: Kabul Highlights
description: Darul Aman Palace, Chicken Street shopping, and farewell lunch. Transfer to airport.
activities: Darul Aman Palace;Chicken Street;Farewell lunch;Airport transfer

title: Arrival in Herat
description: Fly into Herat Airport. Transfer to riad-style guesthouse in the old city. Evening walk through the bazaar.

title: Herat Citadel & Mosque
description: Full morning at the Herat Citadel museum. Afternoon at the Friday Mosque and carpet bazaar. Craft workshop in evening.

title: Musalla Complex & Craft Workshops
description: The Musalla minaret field and Gawhar Shad Mausoleum. Traditional tile-painting and glasswork workshops.

title: Surroundings & Departure
description: Morning visit to the tomb of Jami and a carpet cooperative. Afternoon flight from Herat.
